mapper.select: select id, question_id, mode, attempt_no, task_status, callback_key, source_question_status, failure_reason, created_time, updated_time from question_process_task where question_id = #{questionId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and task_status in ('PENDING_DISPATCH', 'DISPATCHED', 'CALLBACK_RECEIVED') order by created_time desc, id desc limit 1
